features: All our botanical fragrances are formulated with nature-inspired ingredients, carefully selected with respect for our planet.
Enjoy the invigorating scent of pomegranate and bergamot from Italy.
Fragrance infused with natural essential oils.
Natural wax candle with metal free wick.
description: Product Description All Botanica by Air Wick fragrances are infused with natural essential oils and free of phthalates, acetone and dyes. Our fragrances are formulated with natural exotic ingredients, carefully selected with respect for our planet. Botanica candles last up to 90 hours. Safety Warning Keep away from flammable materials. Do not leave a burning candle unattended. Monitor the burning time to prevent the flame from reaching the bottom of the container. Extinguish the candle when it is too close to the bottom. Never leave a burning candle near fabrics, curtains or other flammable materials. Always place the candle on a heat resistant surface. Do not burn the candle for more than 4 hours at a time. Keep away from children and pets. Always follow the manufacturer's instructions for use and disposal.
